title: Tunisian Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir-fry dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, made with blanched vegetables, Tunisian tomatoes, and a hint of stir-fry seasonings.
instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and stir-fry until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the blanched vegetables and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Add the Tunisian tomato paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the tomato and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with fresh parsley.
